title: sarothamnus scoparius var. reverchonii
intro: Sarothamnus scoparius var. reverchonii, commonly known as glandular broom or glandular furze, is a variant of the broom plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Sarothamnus scoparius var. reverchonii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
